revision.comment: handle automatic detection without the need to use 1=. Also add detection for WikiProject banner templates so they are added into a sub-category
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Possibly empty category}}
{{Maintenance category|hidden=yes|tracking=yes}}
{{Category other|
  {{#if: {{{1|}}}
    | {{#ifeq: {{{is_infobox|no}}} | yes
      | [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
      | {{#ifeq: {{lc:{{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}|^[^%s]*}}}} | infobox
        | [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
        | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{{1}}}}} }}
          | infobox = [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
          | wikiproject = [[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
          | [[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{ucfirst:{{trim|1={{{1|<nowiki>*</nowiki>}}}}}}}}}]]
          }}
        }}
      }}
    | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{Str right|{{PAGENAME}}|12}}}} }}
      | infobox = [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|21}} }}]]
      | wikiproject = [[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|25}} }}]]
      | [[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|12}} }}]]
      }}
    }}
  }}
This category contains pages transcluding {{#if: {{{1|}}} | '''[[{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}]]''' ([[Template talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}|talk]]) | a template }} with unknown parameters (undefined, misspelled, etc.). 

Pages are typically sorted alphabetically by the unknown parameter that is used, e.g. pages using unknown parameter {{para|foo}} will be sorted under "F". The name of the page is typically used as a secondary sort key.

<small>Unknown parameters can be detected using [[Module:Check for unknown parameters]] in the template. To show the information listed here on a category page, use {{tl|Unknown parameters category}} on the category page.</small>
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:Is article|main|{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{{1|}}}}} | article || [[Category:Unknown parameters category for a deleted or redirected template| ]]}}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Possibly empty category}}
{{Maintenance category|hidden=yes|tracking=yes}}
{{Category other|
  {{#if: {{{1|}}}
    | {{#ifeq: {{{is_infobox|no}}} | yes
      | [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
      | {{#ifeq: {{lc:{{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}|^[^%s]*}}}} | infobox
        | [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
        | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{{1}}}}} }}
          | infobox = [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
          | wikiproject = [[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
          | [[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{ucfirst:{{trim|1={{{1|<nowiki>*</nowiki>}}}}}}}}}]]
          }}
        }}
      }}
    | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{Str right|{{PAGENAME}}|12}}}} }}
      | infobox = [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|21}} }}]]
      | wikiproject = [[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|25}} }}]]
      | [[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|12}} }}]]
      }}
    }}
  }}
This category contains pages transcluding {{#if: {{{1|}}} | '''[[{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}]]''' ([[Template talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}|talk]]) | a template }} with unknown parameters (undefined, misspelled, etc.). 

Pages are typically sorted alphabetically by the unknown parameter that is used, e.g. pages using unknown parameter {{para|foo}} will be sorted under "F". The name of the page is typically used as a secondary sort key.

<small>Unknown parameters can be detected using [[Module:Check for unknown parameters]] in the template. To show the information listed here on a category page, use {{tl|Unknown parameters category}} on the category page.</small>
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:Is article|main|{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{{1|}}}}} | article || [[Category:Unknown parameters category for a deleted or redirected template| ]]}}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Possibly empty category}}
{{Maintenance category|hidden=yes|tracking=yes}}
{{Category other|
  {{#if: {{{1|}}}
    | {{#ifeq: {{{is_infobox|no}}} | yes
      | [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
      | {{#ifeq: {{lc:{{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}|^[^%s]*}}}} | infobox
        | [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
        | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{{1}}}}} }}
          | infobox = [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
          | wikiproject = [[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
          | [[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{ucfirst:{{trim|1={{{1|<nowiki>*</nowiki>}}}}}}}}}]]
          }}
        }}
      }}
    | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{Str right|{{PAGENAME}}|12}}}} }}
      | infobox = [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|21}} }}]]
      | wikiproject = [[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|25}} }}]]
      | [[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|12}} }}]]
      }}
    }}
  }}
This category contains pages transcluding {{#if: {{{1|}}} | '''[[{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}]]''' ([[Template talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}|talk]]) | a template }} with unknown parameters (undefined, misspelled, etc.). 

Pages are typically sorted alphabetically by the unknown parameter that is used, e.g. pages using unknown parameter {{para|foo}} will be sorted under "F". The name of the page is typically used as a secondary sort key.

<small>Unknown parameters can be detected using [[Module:Check for unknown parameters]] in the template. To show the information listed here on a category page, use {{tl|Unknown parameters category}} on the category page.</small>
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:Is article|main|{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{{1|}}}}} | article || [[Category:Unknown parameters category for a deleted or redirected template| ]]}}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>
<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Possibly empty category}}
{{Maintenance category|hidden=yes|tracking=yes}}
{{Category other|
  {{#if: {{{1|}}}
    | {{#ifeq: {{{is_infobox|no}}} | yes
      | [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
      | {{#ifeq: {{lc:{{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}|^[^%s]*}}}} | infobox
        | [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
        | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{{1}}}}} }}
          | infobox = [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
          | wikiproject = [[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
          | [[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{ucfirst:{{trim|1={{{1|<nowiki>*</nowiki>}}}}}}}}}]]
          }}
        }}
      }}
    | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{Str right|{{PAGENAME}}|12}}}} }}
      | infobox = [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|21}} }}]]
      | wikiproject = [[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|25}} }}]]
      | [[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|12}} }}]]
      }}
    }}
  }}
This category contains pages transcluding {{#if: {{{1|}}} | '''[[{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}]]''' ([[Template talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}|talk]]) | a template }} with unknown parameters (undefined, misspelled, etc.). 

Pages are typically sorted alphabetically by the unknown parameter that is used, e.g. pages using unknown parameter {{para|foo}} will be sorted under "F". The name of the page is typically used as a secondary sort key.

<small>Unknown parameters can be detected using [[Module:Check for unknown parameters]] in the template. To show the information listed here on a category page, use {{tl|Unknown parameters category}} on the category page.</small>
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:Is article|main|{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{{1|}}}}} | article || [[Category:Unknown parameters category for a deleted or redirected template| ]]}}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Possibly empty category}}
{{Maintenance category|hidden=yes|tracking=yes}}
{{Category other|
  {{#if: {{{1|}}}
    | {{#ifeq: {{{is_infobox|no}}} | yes
      | [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
      | {{#ifeq: {{lc:{{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}|^[^%s]*}}}} | infobox
        | [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
        | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{{1}}}}} }}
          | infobox = [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
          | wikiproject = [[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
          | [[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{ucfirst:{{trim|1={{{1|<nowiki>*</nowiki>}}}}}}}}}]]
          }}
        }}
      }}
    | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{Str right|{{PAGENAME}}|12}}}} }}
      | infobox = [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|21}} }}]]
      | wikiproject = [[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|25}} }}]]
      | [[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|12}} }}]]
      }}
    }}
  }}
This category contains pages transcluding {{#if: {{{1|}}} | '''[[{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}]]''' ([[Template talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}|talk]]) | a template }} with unknown parameters (undefined, misspelled, etc.). 

Pages are typically sorted alphabetically by the unknown parameter that is used, e.g. pages using unknown parameter {{para|foo}} will be sorted under "F". The name of the page is typically used as a secondary sort key.

<small>Unknown parameters can be detected using [[Module:Check for unknown parameters]] in the template. To show the information listed here on a category page, use {{tl|Unknown parameters category}} on the category page.</small>
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:Is article|main|{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{{1|}}}}} | article || [[Category:Unknown parameters category for a deleted or redirected template| ]]}}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{Documentation}}</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Text replacement - "{{Documentation}}" to "{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]"
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Possibly empty category}}
{{Maintenance category|hidden=yes|tracking=yes}}
{{Category other|
  {{#if: {{{1|}}}
    | {{#ifeq: {{{is_infobox|no}}} | yes
      | [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
      | {{#ifeq: {{lc:{{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}|^[^%s]*}}}} | infobox
        | [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
        | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{{1}}}}} }}
          | infobox = [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
          | wikiproject = [[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
          | [[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{ucfirst:{{trim|1={{{1|<nowiki>*</nowiki>}}}}}}}}}]]
          }}
        }}
      }}
    | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{Str right|{{PAGENAME}}|12}}}} }}
      | infobox = [[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|21}} }}]]
      | wikiproject = [[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|25}} }}]]
      | [[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|12}} }}]]
      }}
    }}
  }}
This category contains pages transcluding {{#if: {{{1|}}} | '''[[{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}]]''' ([[Template talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}|talk]]) | a template }} with unknown parameters (undefined, misspelled, etc.). 

Pages are typically sorted alphabetically by the unknown parameter that is used, e.g. pages using unknown parameter {{para|foo}} will be sorted under "F". The name of the page is typically used as a secondary sort key.

<small>Unknown parameters can be detected using [[Module:Check for unknown parameters]] in the template. To show the information listed here on a category page, use {{tl|Unknown parameters category}} on the category page.</small>
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:Is article|main|{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{{1|}}}}} | article || [[Category:Unknown parameters category for a deleted or redirected template| ]]}}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude>
[[Category:Templates]]

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 10 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23674194100|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Possibly empty category}}
{{Maintenance category|hidden=yes|tracking=yes}}
{{Category other|
  {{#if: {{{1|}}}
    | {{#ifeq: {{{is_infobox|no}}} | yes
      |       | {{#ifeq: {{lc:{{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}|^[^%s]*}}}} | infobox
        |         | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{{1}}}}} }}
          | infobox =           | wikiproject =           |           }}
        }}
      }}
    | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{Str right|{{PAGENAME}}|12}}}} }}
      | infobox =       | wikiproject =       |       }}
    }}
  }}
This category contains pages transcluding {{#if: {{{1|}}} | '''[[{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}]]''' ([[Template talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}|talk]]) | a template }} with unknown parameters (undefined, misspelled, etc.). 

Pages are typically sorted alphabetically by the unknown parameter that is used, e.g. pages using unknown parameter {{para|foo}} will be sorted under "F". The name of the page is typically used as a secondary sort key.

<small>Unknown parameters can be detected using [[Module:Check for unknown parameters]] in the template. To show the information listed here on a category page, use {{tl|Unknown parameters category}} on the category page.</small>
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:Is article|main|{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{{1|}}}}} | article || }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]</noinclude>
<noinclude>
[[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
[[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
[[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
[[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
[[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{ucfirst:{{trim|1={{{1|<nowiki>*</nowiki>}}}}}}}}}]]
[[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|21}} }}]]
[[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|25}} }}]]
[[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|12}} }}]]
[[Category:Unknown parameters category for a deleted or redirected template| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

<includeonly>{{Possibly empty category}}
{{Maintenance category|hidden=yes|tracking=yes}}
{{Category other|
  {{#if: {{{1|}}}
    | {{#ifeq: {{{is_infobox|no}}} | yes
      |       | {{#ifeq: {{lc:{{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}|^[^%s]*}}}} | infobox
        |         | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{{1}}}}} }}
          | infobox =           | wikiproject =           |           }}
        }}
      }}
    | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{Str right|{{PAGENAME}}|12}}}} }}
      | infobox =       | wikiproject =       |       }}
    }}
  }}
This category contains pages transcluding {{#if: {{{1|}}} | '''[[{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}]]''' ([[Template talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}|talk]]) | a template }} with unknown parameters (undefined, misspelled, etc.). 

Pages are typically sorted alphabetically by the unknown parameter that is used, e.g. pages using unknown parameter {{para|foo}} will be sorted under "F". The name of the page is typically used as a secondary sort key.

<small>Unknown parameters can be detected using [[Module:Check for unknown parameters]] in the template. To show the information listed here on a category page, use {{tl|Unknown parameters category}} on the category page.</small>
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:Is article|main|{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{{1|}}}}} | article || }}</includeonly><!--

--><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
[[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
[[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
[[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
[[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{ucfirst:{{trim|1={{{1|<nowiki>*</nowiki>}}}}}}}}}]]
[[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|21}} }}]]
[[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|25}} }}]]
[[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|12}} }}]]
[[Category:Unknown parameters category for a deleted or redirected template| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: strip HTML comments [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24999656626|time triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<includeonly>{{Possibly empty category}}
{{Maintenance category|hidden=yes|tracking=yes}}
{{Category other|
  {{#if: {{{1|}}}
    | {{#ifeq: {{{is_infobox|no}}} | yes
      |       | {{#ifeq: {{lc:{{#invoke:String|match|s={{{1}}}|^[^%s]*}}}} | infobox
        |         | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{{1}}}}} }}
          | infobox =           | wikiproject =           |           }}
        }}
      }}
    | {{#switch: {{lc: {{First word|{{Str right|{{PAGENAME}}|12}}}} }}
      | infobox =       | wikiproject =       |       }}
    }}
  }}
This category contains pages transcluding {{#if: {{{1|}}} | '''[[{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}]]''' ([[Template talk:{{ucfirst:{{{1}}}}}|talk]]) | a template }} with unknown parameters (undefined, misspelled, etc.). 

Pages are typically sorted alphabetically by the unknown parameter that is used, e.g. pages using unknown parameter {{para|foo}} will be sorted under "F". The name of the page is typically used as a secondary sort key.

<small>Unknown parameters can be detected using [[Module:Check for unknown parameters]] in the template. To show the information listed here on a category page, use {{tl|Unknown parameters category}} on the category page.</small>
{{CatAutoTOC}}
{{#ifeq: {{#invoke:Is article|main|{{#if: {{{module|}}} | Module: | Template: }}{{{1|}}}}} | article || }}</includeonly><noinclude>{{Documentation}}[[Category:Templates with Documentation template]]
[[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
[[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{{infobox_sort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{{1}}}|9}} }}]]
[[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
[[Category:WikiProject templates with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} |{{Remove first word|{{{1}}}}} }}]]
[[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{ucfirst:{{trim|1={{{1|<nowiki>*</nowiki>}}}}}}}}}]]
[[Category:Infoboxes with unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{{infobox_sort|{{{catsort|}}}}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|21}} }}]]

[[Category:Unknown parameters|{{#if: {{{catsort|}}} | {{{catsort|}}} | {{#invoke:String|sub|{{PAGENAME}}|12}} }}]]
[[Category:Unknown parameters category for a deleted or redirected template| ]]
[[Category:Templates]]
[[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]]
</noinclude>
